title: Intelligent brake light
abstract: : The intelligent brake light system works so that the momentum and momentum control speeds up the speed of the car. Data on speed variations is obtained using the car's GPS. Then, these data are instantaneously received by the computer and according to the algorithm defined, there are different situations of how to reduce the speed by the brake light to the rear driver. In fact, using this system, the parts on the rear brake lights The accessories of this system can be installed according to the type of vehicle, and it is suitable for all light styles and even heavy ones.
claims: Claims Claims: Claim 1: Intelligent display of the car's brake lights display, using automobile speed data received by the processing and decision maker; Increasing the level of awareness of the driver behind the speed of the vehicle's front deceleration; The performance of the brake light's brightness proportional to the speed variation; Awareness when stopping by using a light bulb. Claim 2: In Claim 1, in which the levels of awareness for the rear driver include how to brake the front driver, consists of three levels of lighting for the brake lights and a dynamic level of brightness with a light bulb.
